advancements.potions-n-rituals.albedo.de: Wash away impurities and brew your first potions
advancements.potions-n-rituals.citrinita: Channel Nether energies to forge your first talismans and artifacts
advancements.potions-n-rituals.nigredo.d: Delve into chaos and create the Primordial Matter
advancements.potions-n-rituals.rubedo.de: Achieve absolute perfection by performing great worldly rituals
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.albedo.body: Albedo marks the beginning of purification. Once the Materia Prima is obtained, you will learn to dissolve and bind it to infuse volatile essences. This is the art of designing advanced alchemical Potions with unsuspected virtues.
Citrinitas pushes matter towards its crystallization and awakening. By capturing the volatile effects of your potions to fix them into matter, you will become able to forge magical Talismans and Artifacts transmitting permanent powers.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.nigredo.bod: Nigredo is the phase of decomposition and extraction. It is here that you separate the basic components of the world to isolate the three fundamental principles: Sulfur, Mercury, and Salt, in order to shape the Materia Prima.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.opus.body: The fulfillment of the Art is divided into four major successive stages. This first volume lays the foundations of your journey. Understanding the order of the works is the key to not getting lost in the twists and turns of creation.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.opus.title: The Way of the Alchemist
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.rubedo.body: The ultimate achievement and absolute mastery of the Great Work. Rubedo is the culmination where all your knowledge merges. By combining matter, fluids, and your artifacts, you can erect powerful Rituals capable of bending reality to your will.
book.potions-n-rituals.basic.toc2: Click on a section to begin:
book.potions-n-rituals.page.acid.brew: Mix a §2rotten flesh§r and a §2poison potion§r to get a highly toxic mixture.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.acid.resume:
Substance highly §2toxic§r,

Use with precaution.

Can cause indigestion.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.adhesion.bre: Find something sticky, maybe like §2resin§r. Mix it with an §2awkward potion§r, it should be sufficient.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.adhesion.exp:
You stick to surfaces, allowing you to walk on walls.

Very useful for repelling away spiders.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alchemist.br: Take an alchemist item like the §6mercury ball§r and an §6awkward potion§r to achieve that dream.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alchemist.re:
The dream of every alchemist,

§7coal§r that become §6gold§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alcohol.brew: Mix §2sweet berries§r and an §2awkward potion§r, to get some liquor.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.alcohol.expl:
Gives entity a feeling of loss.

You §2lose control§r, yet everything seems so §2funny§r !
book.potions-n-rituals.page.darkness.bre: An ink sac mixed with an awkward potion is great to mimic the effect.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.darkness.exp:
You lose your sight, everything turn black.

There is just one thing to remember...

§4RUN§r

He's close...
book.potions-n-rituals.page.darkness.res: Everything disappear, only the §7void§r keep showing itself.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.glowing.brew: A §6Night Vision Potion§r allow you to see in the dark while a §6glow berry§r make you glow... pretty straight forward.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.glowing.expl: Make entity §6glow§r so that you can see them in the dark and behind walls.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.glowing.resu:
It's a bit dark in here...

But I can §6see§r you very well
book.potions-n-rituals.page.haste.brew: Cat dig a lot, so a §6claw§r with an §6awkward potion§r might give you the potion
book.potions-n-rituals.page.haste.explan:
You can mine everything §6faster§r,

really really §6fast§r.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.levitation.b: A §3Slow Falling potion§r with a §3feather§r should be good enough to lighten your burden.
book.potions-n-rituals.page.levitation.e:
You fall slowly, so slowly that you don't take fall damage.

It's like you are on the §3Moon§r.

§4Be careful, it only last a moment.§r
book.potions-n-rituals.page.levitation.r: Gravity is a weight on the shoulders, forget it
book.potions-n-rituals.page.mining_fatig: You reverse the §4potion of haste§r with a §4fermented spider eye§r

Wow, it's a §7hard stone§r ! 

I can't break it.
Runes can only be used on blocks
item.potions-n-rituals.alchemy_guide_bas: Magnus Opus: The Foundations of Alchemy
splash.potionsnrituals.thanks: Thank you for supporting me LivelyBadGood
tooltip.potions-n-rituals.talisman_charg: The talisman overflows with spiritual energy.
